title: Epic: Improved Calibration and Marker Defaults Implementation
description: Implement the multi-step calibration wizard (PPI, Extrinsics) and global ArUco defaults as described in features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md.

title: Review Design: Improved Calibration
description: DESIGN REVIEW ONLY. Review features/improved_calibration_and_marker_defaults.md for completeness and readiness for implementation. Verify the math for pose estimation (solvePnP) and the proposed data structures for ArUco defaults. No code implementation allowed during this task.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define User Feedback for solvePnP Residuals (QUESTION TO USER)
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Determine how to communicate calibration quality (reprojection error) to the user during the solvePnP step.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define Multi-token Calibration Flow
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Detail the interactive sequence for placing and identifying tokens of different heights during Step 3 of calibration.

title: Improve calibration and marker defaults
description: 1. Add default marker configuration for new maps. 2. Expand projector_calibration.py to include PPI calibration and camera pose estimation (extrinsics) using markers of known height. Handle imprecise marker placement by using the homography to find the base (X, Y) of detected markers.

title: Epic: ArUco-Based Token Tracking Implementation
description: Implement real-time ArUco tracking with parallax correction, grid snapping, and temporal filtering as described in features/aruco_token_tracking.md.

title: Review Design: ArUco Tracking
description: DESIGN REVIEW ONLY. Review features/aruco_token_tracking.md for completeness and readiness for implementation. Ensure the parallax correction ray-plane intersection logic is robust and grid snapping for nxn tokens is well-defined. No code implementation allowed during this task.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define Handling of Marker Occlusion Buffers (QUESTION TO USER)
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Determine the specific timeout/buffer strategy for maintaining token visibility when markers are temporarily occluded by hands.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Define ID Conflict Strategy
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Define the fallback behavior and default properties for ArUco IDs that are detected but not configured.

title: DESIGN ONLY: Evaluate Auto-Detection vs. Fixed Height for Stability
description: DESIGN REFINEMENT ONLY. No code. Compare the stability of Ray-Plane intersection (using fixed height_mm) against real-time ArUco pose estimation. Decide if the system should favor stability or auto-detection of heights.

title: Design Aruco-based token tracking
description: Create a design document in features/ for tracking tokens using Aruco markers. Address elevation/parallax, grid snapping (1x1, nxn), PC/NPC classification, and continuous scanning resilience.
